name: American Express® Gold Card
effective_cost: Low if you use the monthly credits

verdict.text: Keep if dining/grocery spend and the monthly credits are real habits

earn_rates.category: Flights — via Amex Travel or direct with airlines
Prepaid car rentals & cruises — via Amex Travel

earn_note: The 4× restaurant/supermarket caps ($50k and $25k/yr) are generous enough that most households never hit them. Hotel and flight bonus rates only apply booked through Amex Travel (hotels) or direct with the airline (flights).

points.note: Same Membership Rewards currency as the Platinum — cashing out at 0.6¢ throws away most of the value; the same transfer partners apply.

transfer_partners.highlight: Shares the Platinum's full Membership Rewards transfer chart — 17 airline and 3 hotel partners.
transfer_partners.recent_changes: Subject to the same program-wide changes as any other Membership Rewards card (see the Platinum's transfer partner notes).

credits.name: Dining Credit
credits.subtitle: $10/mo · enroll
credits.description: Up to $10/month in statement credits at Grubhub, The Cheesecake Factory, Five Guys, Wonder and other participating partners.
tips: Enrollment required in the Amex app before credits start posting.

credits.name: Uber Cash
credits.subtitle: $10/mo
credits.description: $10 in Uber Cash loaded monthly for U.S. Uber rides and Uber Eats orders.
tips: Add the card in the Uber app wallet — the cash won't appear until you do.

credits.name: Dunkin' Credit
credits.subtitle: $7/mo · enroll
credits.description: Up to $7/month in statement credits at U.S. Dunkin' locations.

credits.name: Resy Dining Credit
credits.subtitle: $50 × 2 · semi-annual
credits.description: Up to $50 in statement credits twice a year (Jan–Jun, Jul–Dec) at qualifying Resy restaurants.
tips: No rollover between halves — an unused H1 doesn't carry into H2.

credits.name: The Hotel Collection Credit
credits.subtitle: $100 · per eligible booking
credits.description: $100 credit toward eligible charges at 1,300+ Hotel Collection properties booked via Amex Travel — no cap on number of qualifying stays per year.
tips: Stacks with the 5× points rate on the same prepaid hotel booking.

insurance.detail: Car Rental Loss & Damage Insurance — secondary in the US
24/7 Global Assist Hotline (coordination only — cardholder pays for services rendered)

protection_note: Noticeably thinner than the Platinum or Sapphire Reserve — trip delay caps at $300/trip and rental coverage is secondary. This card isn't built to be your primary travel-protection card.
rental_note: Rental coverage is secondary in the US. If you rent often, put the charge on your Venture X or Sapphire Reserve instead and use those cards' free primary coverage.

status_perks.name: Hertz Five Star Status
status_perks.note: A step below full elite tiers — faster pickup counter and occasional upgrades, enrollment required. No hotel status or lounge access on this card.

services.name: Global Assist Hotline
services.detail: 24/7 emergency coordination when traveling 100+ miles from home (cardholder pays for any services rendered).

additional_cards.title: Additional Cards

benefits.text: Free for up to 5 additional cards
Earns Membership Rewards on their spend (into your account)

additional_cards.note: Up to five Additional Cards are free — a cheap way to add earning power across a household without raising the $325 primary fee.

timeline.text: Hotel Collection prepaid bookings raised from 2× to 5× Membership Rewards points; added complimentary Hertz Five Star status.
